title: Unlocking the Address Book: Dissecting the Sparse Semantic Structure of LLM Key-Value Caches via Sparse Autoencoders
method: Sparse Semantic Self-Attention (STA-Attention) using Top-K Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs)
key_findings: KV information lies on a low-dimensional, sparse semantic manifold
Hierarchical addressing mechanism with functional stratification of attention
Discovery of the 'Semantic Elbow' at K=8 where Top-8 active latents recover over 80% of Key vector directionality
Key-Value asymmetry: Keys are sparse (routing) while Values are dense (logical payloads)
Dual-Budget Strategy (K_key=8, K_val=16) maximizes compression while preserving reasoning capabilities
performance: Matches zero-shot performance and perplexity of dense baselines (K=128) with significantly reduced memory
